requirement_topic.en: MEA / PEA Grid-Connection Code and Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: MEA / PEA 并网规范与项目批准
requirement_topic.zht: MEA / PEA 併網規範與專案批准

summary.en: Solar PV projects in Thailand must be reviewed against the requirements of the distribution utility serving the site. PEA publishes grid-connection requirements, including the B.E. 2559 requirements and PEA's 2022 revision notice on connection format and protection, use-of-network requirements, operation requirements, and change-of-equipment notices for connected generators; MEA territory projects should be handled through MEA's corresponding connection and approval process. Inverter settings, protection functions, anti-islanding behavior, metering, drawings, and commissioning documents are project approval items, not only factory product-test items.
summary.zh: 泰国太阳能光伏项目必须按场址所属配电公用事业的要求审查。PEA 发布发电设施并网要求（包括 B.E. 2559 要求及 PEA 关于接入形式和保护的2022年修订公告）、网络使用要求、运行要求及并网方设备变更公告；MEA 供电区域项目应按 MEA 相应接入和批准流程办理。逆变器参数、保护功能、防孤岛行为、计量、图纸和投运文件属于项目批准事项，而不仅是工厂产品测试事项。
summary.zht: 泰國太陽能光伏專案必須按場址所屬配電公用事業的要求審查。PEA 發布發電設施併網要求（包括 B.E. 2559 要求及 PEA 關於接入形式和保護的2022年修訂公告）、網路使用要求、運行要求及併網方設備變更公告；MEA 供電區域專案應按 MEA 相應接入和批准流程辦理。逆變器參數、保護功能、防孤島行為、計量、圖紙和投運文件屬於專案批准事項，而不僅是工廠產品測試事項。

standards_or_laws: PEA 2022 revision notice on connection format and protection under PEA grid-connection requirements B.E. 2559 (converter_revise2022.pdf; B.E. 2565 update)

summary.en: China GB/T 19964 and GB/T 37408 evidence can describe Chinese grid behavior and inverter technical performance, but it does not replace Thai utility review, local drawings, metering arrangements, or site commissioning under MEA or PEA procedures.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 19964 和 GB/T 37408 证据可说明中国电网行为和逆变器技术性能，但不能替代 MEA 或 PEA 程序下的泰国公用事业审查、本地图纸、计量安排或现场投运。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 19964 和 GB/T 37408 證據可說明中國電網行為和逆變器技術性能，但不能替代 MEA 或 PEA 程序下的泰國公用事業審查、本地圖紙、計量安排或現場投運。

gap.en: The exporter should provide Thai project teams with adjustable grid-code parameter tables, anti-islanding evidence, protection relay logic, single-line diagrams, meter and CT/PT details where relevant, firmware-locking or installer-setting instructions, and model certificates aligned to the equipment installed on the site.
gap.zh: 出口商应向泰国项目团队提供可调并网参数表、防孤岛证据、保护继电逻辑、单线图、适用时的电表及 CT/PT 资料、固件锁定或安装商参数设置说明，以及与现场安装设备一致的型号证书。
gap.zht: 出口商應向泰國專案團隊提供可調併網參數表、防孤島證據、保護繼電邏輯、單線圖、適用時的電錶及 CT/PT 資料、韌體鎖定或安裝商參數設定說明，以及與現場安裝設備一致的型號證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected projects in the applicable MEA or PEA service territory; acceptance is project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China grid-code documentation does not authorize Thai grid connection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat MEA / PEA interconnection as a local project gate; China GB/T reports are supporting evidence, not Thai utility approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 MEA / PEA 并网视为本地项目门槛；中国 GB/T 报告只是支持性证据，不是泰国公用事业批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 MEA / PEA 併網視為本地專案門檻；中國 GB/T 報告只是支持性證據，不是泰國公用事業批准。
